title: ClickHouse Cluster
description: ClickHouse metrics for ch-customer-1 / Keeper: ch-keeper-1 — sourced from OTel pipeline (migrated from Prometheus dashboard 23285)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseMetrics_VersionInteger')) AS version, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseMetrics_Revision')) AS revision, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_NumberOfDatabases')) AS databases, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_NumberOfTables')) AS tables, round(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_Uptime'),0) AS uptime_s, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseMetrics_ReadonlyReplica')) AS readonly_replicas, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseMetrics_KafkaConsumers')) AS kafka_consumers, round((1-argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSIdleTimeNormalized'))*100,1) AS cpu_pct, round(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSUptime'),0) AS os_uptime_s FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName IN ('ClickHouseMetrics_VersionInteger','ClickHouseMetrics_Revision','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_NumberOfDatabases','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_NumberOfTables','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_Uptime','ClickHouseMetrics_ReadonlyReplica','ClickHouseMetrics_KafkaConsumers','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSIdleTimeNormalized','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSUptime') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE

SELECT replaceRegexpOne(MetricName,'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_Disk[A-Za-z]+_(.*)','\\1') AS disk, maxIf(Value,MetricName LIKE '%DiskTotal_%') AS total, maxIf(Value,MetricName LIKE '%DiskUsed_%') AS used, maxIf(Value,MetricName LIKE '%DiskAvailable_%') AS available, maxIf(Value,MetricName LIKE '%DiskUnreserved_%') AS unreserved, round(maxIf(Value,MetricName LIKE '%DiskUsed_%') / nullIf(maxIf(Value,MetricName LIKE '%DiskTotal_%'),0)*100,1) AS usage_pct FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND (MetricName LIKE 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskTotal_%' OR MetricName LIKE 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskUsed_%' OR MetricName LIKE 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskAvailable_%' OR MetricName LIKE 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskUnreserved_%') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY disk ORDER BY disk

panels.title: Disk Usage Increase per 10min(Minus value means decrease)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, disk, increase_10min FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, replaceRegexpOne(MetricName,'.*_([^_]+)$','\\1') AS disk, Value - lagInFrame(Value,1,Value) OVER (PARTITION BY MetricName ORDER BY TimeUnix) AS increase_10min FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName LIKE 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskUsed_%' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime - INTERVAL 12 MINUTE AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime) ORDER BY time

panels.title: ClickHouse Service Memory Usage
panels.description: Total amount of memory (bytes) allocated by the server. This is the internal memory tracking by ClickHouse, instead of OS Level memory.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS clickhousemetrics_memorytracking FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_MemoryTracking' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Node Memory Available(Free + Cache)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS clickhouseasyncmetrics_osmemoryavailable FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSMemoryAvailable' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS clickhouseasyncmetrics_osmemorytotal FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSMemoryTotal' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, replaceRegexpOne(MetricName,'.*_([^_]+)$','\\1') AS disk, avg(Value) AS available_bytes FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName LIKE 'ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_DiskAvailable_%' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time, disk ORDER BY time

panels.title: Disk Usage Increase Daily(Minus value means decrease)

panels.title: OS Memory Cache
panels.description:
The amount of memory used by the OS page cache, in bytes. Typically, almost all available memory is used by the OS page cache - high values of this metric are normal and expected."
                        " This is a system-wide metric, it includes all the processes on the host machine, not just clickhouse-server.

panels.title: Queries Per Second
panels.description: Number of queries to be interpreted and potentially executed. Does not include queries that failed to parse or were rejected due to AST size limits, quota limits or limits on the number of simultaneously running queries. May include internal queries initiated by ClickHouse itself. Does not count subqueries.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS clickhouseprofileevents_query FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_Query' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Same as Queries, but only for SELECT queries.

panels.title: Avg All Query Time per Query
panels.description: Avg queries latencies for all different kinds of queries(SELECT, INSERT and Other)

targets.rawSql: SELECT t1.time AS time, t1.d / nullIf(t2.d, 0) AS avg_query_us FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_QueryTimeMicroseconds' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t1 JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_Query' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t2 ON t1.time=t2.time ORDER BY t1.time

panels.title: Avg SELECT Query Time per Query
panels.description: Avg SELECT queries latencies

targets.rawSql: SELECT t1.time AS time, t1.d / nullIf(t2.d, 0) AS avg_select_us FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_SelectQueryTimeMicroseconds' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t1 JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_SelectQuery' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t2 ON t1.time=t2.time ORDER BY t1.time

panels.title: Avg INSERT Query Time per Query

targets.rawSql: SELECT t1.time AS time, t1.d / nullIf(t2.d, 0) AS avg_insert_us FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertQueryTimeMicroseconds' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t1 JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_InsertQuery' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t2 ON t1.time=t2.time ORDER BY t1.time

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS clickhouseprofileevents_writebufferfromfiledescr FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_WriteBufferFromFileDescriptorWriteFailed' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Read Compressed Bytes per Second
panels.description: Number of bytes (the number of bytes before decompression) read from compressed sources (files, network).

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS clickhouseprofileevents_readcompressedbytes FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_ReadCompressedBytes' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Write Bytes to File Descriptor per Second

panels.title: Compressed Blocks Read per Second
panels.description: Number of compressed blocks (the blocks of data that are compressed independent of each other) read from compressed sources (files, network).

panels.title: Read Uncompressed Bytes per Second
panels.description: Number of uncompressed bytes (the number of bytes after decompression) read from compressed sources (files, network).

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS clickhouseprofileevents_compressedreadbufferbyte FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_CompressedReadBufferBytes' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Number of Fetch Request for Merged Parts of Replicated Parts
panels.description: Number of times we prefer to download already merged part from replica of ReplicatedMergeTree table instead of performing a merge ourself (usually we prefer doing a merge ourself to save network traffic). This happens when we have not all source parts to perform a merge or when the data part is old enough.

panels.title: Number of Times that We Found Lost Parts
panels.description: Number of times a data part that we wanted doesn't exist on any replica (even on replicas that are offline right now). That data parts are definitely lost. This is normal due to asynchronous replication (if quorum inserts were not enabled), when the replica on which the data part was written was failed and when it became online after fail it doesn't contain that data part.

panels.title: Avg Time of Distributed Delayed Inserts
panels.description: Total number of milliseconds spent while the INSERT of a block to a Distributed table was throttled due to high number of pending bytes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t1.time AS time, t1.d / nullIf(t2.d, 0) AS avg_dist_delay_ms FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_DistributedDelayedInsertsMilliseconds' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t1 JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value)-min(Value),0) AS d FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName='${cluster}' AND MetricName='ClickHouseProfileEvents_DistributedDelayedInserts' AND TimeUnix>=$__fromTime AND TimeUnix<=$__toTime GROUP BY time) t2 ON t1.time=t2.time ORDER BY t1.time

panels.description: Number of sessions (connections) to ZooKeeper. Should be no more than one, because using more than one connection to ZooKeeper may lead to bugs due to lack of linearizability (stale reads) that ZooKeeper consistency model allows.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS clickhousemetrics_keepersession FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_ZooKeeperSession' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Ephemeral Node

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS clickhousemetrics_ephemeralnode FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_EphemeralNode' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Current Running Keeper Watches from ClickHouse

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS clickhousemetrics_keeperrequest FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseMetrics_ZooKeeperRequest' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Number of CannotRemoveEphemeralNode Failures per Second
panels.description: Number of times an error happened while trying to remove ephemeral node. This is not an issue, because our implementation of ZooKeeper library guarantee that the session will expire and the node will be removed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, greatest(max(Value) - min(Value), 0) AS clickhouseprofileevents_cannotremoveephemeralnod FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND MetricName = 'ClickHouseProfileEvents_CannotRemoveEphemeralNode' AND TimeUnix >= $__fromTime AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperIsLeader')) AS is_leader, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperIsFollower')) AS is_follower, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperIsObserver')) AS is_observer, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperZnodeCount')) AS znode_count, toUInt32(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_NumberOfTables')) AS tables, round(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_Uptime'),0) AS uptime_s, round((1-argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSIdleTimeNormalized'))*100,1) AS cpu_pct, round(argMaxIf(Value,TimeUnix,MetricName='ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSUptime'),0) AS os_uptime_s FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE ServiceName=REPLACE('${cluster}', 'ch-customer-', 'ch-keeper-customer-') AND MetricName IN ('ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperIsLeader','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperIsFollower','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperIsObserver','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_KeeperZnodeCount','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_NumberOfTables','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_Uptime','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSIdleTimeNormalized','ClickHouseAsyncMetrics_OSUptime') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE

panels.title: Log Error / Warning Rate
panels.description: Count of Error and Warning log entries per minute.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, count() AS errors FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND SeverityText = 'Error' AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, count() AS warnings FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}' AND SeverityText = 'Warning' AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime AND Timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT
  Timestamp,
  SeverityText AS Severity,
  LogAttributes['logger_name'] AS Logger,
  Body,
  LogAttributes['query_id'] AS `Query ID`
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE ServiceName = '${cluster}'
  AND Timestamp >= $__fromTime
  AND Timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY Timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500
